'''dawutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zebibyte|zebibyte]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-w-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zebibyte|zebibyte]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dawutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæwitith|dæwitith]] || [[word:dæwitij|dæwitij]] || [[word:dæwitish|dæwitish]] || [[word:dæwiti|dæwiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dawuwututh|dawuwututh]] || [[word:dawuwutuj|dawuwutuj]] || [[word:dawuwutush|dawuwutush]] || [[word:dawuwutu|dawuwutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dawututh|dawututh]] || [[word:dawutuj|dawutuj]] || [[word:dawutush|dawutush]] || [[word:dawutu|dawutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dawuftuth|dawuftuth]] || [[word:dawuftuj|dawuftuj]] || [[word:dawuftush|dawuftush]] || [[word:dawuftuf|dawuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dawututhu|dawututhu]] || [[word:dawutuju|dawutuju]] || [[word:dawutushu|dawutushu]] || [[word:dawutuku|dawutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dawututh|dawututh]] || [[word:dawutuj|dawutuj]] || [[word:dawutush|dawutush]] || [[word:dawutu|dawutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dawututhul|dawututhul]] || [[word:dawutujul|dawutujul]] || [[word:dawutushul|dawutushul]] || [[word:dawutukul|dawutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dawututhuthu|dawututhuthu]] || [[word:dawutujuju|dawutujuju]] || [[word:dawutushushu|dawutushushu]] || [[word:dawutuku|dawutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dawututhun|dawututhun]] || [[word:dawutujun|dawutujun]] || [[word:dawutushun|dawutushun]] || [[word:dawutukun|dawutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dawututhuoro|dawututhuoro]] || [[word:dawutujuoro|dawutujuoro]] || [[word:dawutushuoro|dawutushuoro]] || [[word:dawutukuoro|dawutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
